title: Agent
description: General schema for human, hybrid, and AI agents

jacsAgentType.description: Type of the agent. 'human' indicates a biological entity, 'human-org' indicates a group of people, hybrid' indicates a combination of human and artificial components, 'ai' indicates a fully artificial intelligence.

jacsAgentDomain.description: Optional domain used for DNSSEC-validated public key fingerprint (_v1.agent.jacs.<domain>.)

jacsVerificationClaim.description: Agent's claim about verification status. 'unverified' (default) allows relaxed DNS/TLS settings. 'verified' requires strict DNS with DNSSEC and domain must be set. 'verified-registry' requires registry verification. DEPRECATED: 'verified-hai.ai' is a deprecated alias for 'verified-registry' and will be removed in the next major version.

jacsKeyRotationProof.description: Cryptographic proof that a key rotation was authorized by the previous key holder. Present only on agent versions created by key rotation.

signature.description: Base64-encoded signature of the transition message, created with the OLD private key

signingAlgorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm used to create the transition signature (the OLD key's algorithm)

oldPublicKeyHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the old (pre-rotation) public key

newPublicKeyHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the new (post-rotation) public key

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the rotation event
